title: Topline Pack of 4 Big K Barbeque Firelighter Odourless Fluid - BBQs, Firepits - Indoor Fires & Log Burners - Camping Grill - Bonfire - 1000ml with Unique Card.
features: Big K barbecue lighting fluid is ideal for starting your barbecue in a safe manner.
1 litre; Safety cap; PET shatterproof bottle; Less risk of spillage.
Suitable for making a fire in almost all weather conditions
Safe and reliable liquid fuel is all you need for running a variety of applications in the outdoors and barbeque.

Big K Liquid Fuel will safely run a variety of devices in the outdoors. Including all of BBQs, Firepits, Indoor fires & log burners - Camping Grills and Bonfire. It is ideal ideal for camping, barbecue charcoal or any other bbq grill. Comes with unique Topline Thank You Card.
